data.title: ACME_DISTRIBUTION_AGREEMENT
data.context: DISTRIBUTION AGREEMENT. This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of New York. Distributor may not assign this Agreement without prior written consent of Company. The term shall begin on January 1, 2024 and end on December 31, 2024.
